parts.text: 2025-2026 年搜索智能体或 Deep Research 产品/论文有哪些代表性进展？

arguments.description: OpenAI Deep Research 产品进展
arguments.prompt:
你负责收集 OpenAI 在 2025-2026 年间关于 "Deep Research"（深度研究）产品的信息。请进行以下搜索：

1. 搜索 "OpenAI Deep Research 2025 product launch"
2. 搜索 "OpenAI deep research agent capabilities 2025"
3. 搜索 "OpenAI deep research vs other agents 2025 2026"
4. 搜索 "OpenAI deep research paper technical report"

对于每次搜索，点击并获取最有信息量的前 2-3 个网页的完整内容。特别关注：产品发布细节、技术能力、评测表现、与竞品的对比、论文/技术报告等。

请输出你获取到的所有来源的 URL 和从页面提取的关键信息。格式要求：列出每个 URL，以及从中提取的重要事实和数据。

arguments.description: Google Deep Research / Gemini 进展
arguments.prompt:
你负责收集 Google / DeepMind 在 2025-2026 年间关于 "Deep Research" 或 AI 搜索智能体的进展。请进行以下搜索：

1. 搜索 "Google Deep Research 2025 Gemini agent"
2. 搜索 "Google Mariner agent 2025 research"
3. 搜索 "Google AI agent search 2025 2026 advances"
4. 搜索 "DeepMind research agent paper 2025"

对于每次搜索，点击并获取最有信息量的前 2-3 个网页的完整内容。特别关注：Gemini Deep Research 功能、Mariner 或其他 agent 产品、技术论文、评测表现等。

请输出你获取到的所有来源的 URL 和从页面提取的关键信息。

arguments.description: Perplexity 及其他 AI 搜索产品进展
arguments.prompt:
你负责收集 Perplexity AI 和其他新兴 AI 搜索产品在 2025-2026 年的进展。请进行以下搜索：

1. 搜索 "Perplexity AI deep research 2025 2026"
2. 搜索 "Perplexity agent search features 2025"
3. 搜索 "AI search agent startup 2025 deep research"
4. 搜索 "Perplexity vs OpenAI deep research comparison 2025"
5. 搜索 "You.com AI deep research agent 2025"

对于每次搜索，点击并获取最有信息量的前 2-3 个网页的完整内容。特别关注：新产品功能、搜索深度、多步推理能力、信息源引用质量等。

请输出你获取到的所有来源的 URL 和从页面提取的关键信息。

arguments.description: 学术论文：搜索智能体与 Deep Research
arguments.prompt:
你负责收集 2025-2026 年间关于搜索智能体（Search Agents）和 Deep Research 的学术论文。请进行以下搜索：

1. 搜索 "search agent deep research paper 2025 arXiv"
2. 搜索 "LLM agent web search research 2025 paper"
3. 搜索 "autonomous information seeking agent 2025"
4. 搜索 "multi-step reasoning search agent paper 2025"
5. 搜索 "deep research benchmark agent 2025"

对于每次搜索，点击并获取最有信息量的前 2-3 个网页的完整内容。特别关注：arXiv 论文、知名会议论文、技术报告、基准测试等。

请输出你获取到的所有来源的 URL 和从页面提取的关键信息。

arguments.description: 中国厂商 Deep Research 产品进展
arguments.prompt:
你负责收集中国科技公司在 2025-2026 年间关于 "Deep Research" 或深度搜索智能体的产品进展。请进行以下搜索：

1. 搜索 "百度 deep research 2025 搜索智能体"
2. 搜索 "阿里 deep research 产品 2025"
3. 搜索 "DeepSeek deep research 2025"
4. 搜索 "智谱 AutoGLM deep research 2025"
5. 搜索 "Kimi 深度搜索 2025 deep research"
6. 搜索 "腾讯 deep research 搜索 2025"

对于每次搜索，点击并获取最有信息量的前 2-3 个网页的完整内容。特别关注：产品发布、技术能力、中文搜索特色、与海外产品的对比等。

请输出你获取到的所有来源的 URL 和从页面提取的关键信息。

parts.content:
{
  "query": "Google / DeepMind 2025-2026 advances in Deep Research, Mariner, and AI search agents",
  "candidate_urls": [
    {
      "url": "https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/models/deep-research-max-preview-04-2026",
      "reason": "Official Gemini API docs for Deep Research Max preview, with technical specifications"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.13131",
      "reason": "AlphaEvolve paper - coding agent for scientific discovery by DeepMind"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2512.08296",
      "reason": "Google Research paper 'Towards a Science of Scaling Agent Systems'"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2510.11967",
      "reason": "Paper on Context-Folding for scaling long-horizon LLM agents"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://www.makeuseof.com/google-search-is-getting-a-complete-ai-overhaul-heres-whats-actually-changing/",
      "reason": "Detailed overview of Google Search AI overhaul at I/O 2026"
    }
  ],
  "fetched_sources": [
    {
      "title": "Meet Deep Research, your new AI research assistant (Google Workspace Blog)",
      "url": "https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/meet-deep-research-your-new-ai-research-assistant",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Official Google blog (March 2025) describes Deep Research in Gemini Advanced: generates custom research plan, uses Google Search to find credible sources, provides citations, supports iterative refinement and follow-up questions. Part of Gemini's move toward agentic AI.",
      "notes": "Consumer-focused description; powered by Gemini 1.5 Pro at launch, later upgraded."
    },
    {
      "title": "Next generation Gemini Deep Research (Google Blog)",
      "url": "https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/next-generation-gemini-deep-research/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "April 2026 announcement of Deep Research and Deep Research Max, both powered by Gemini 3.1 Pro. Deep Research is optimized for speed/efficiency; Deep Research Max for maximum comprehensiveness. Features: MCP support, native charts/infographics, collaborative planning, multimodal grounding, real-time streaming. Partners include FactSet, S&P Global, PitchBook. Available via Interactions API paid tiers.",
      "notes": "Official Google blog; most up-to-date Deep Research product info."
    },
    {
      "title": "Gemini Deep Research overview (gemini.google.com)",
      "url": "https://gemini.google/overview/deep-research/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Official Gemini page explains Deep Research as an agentic feature that browses hundreds of websites, Gmail, Drive, Chat. Describes planning-search-reasoning-reporting pipeline. Technical challenges: multi-step planning, long-running inference (async task manager for error recovery), context management (1M token window + RAG). Evolved from Gemini 1.5 Pro to 2.0 Flash Thinking to Gemini 3.",
      "notes": "Product overview page; also details how the system was built internally."
    },
    {
      "title": "Google rolls out Project Mariner (TechCrunch)",
      "url": "https://techcrunch.com/2025/05/20/google-rolls-out-project-mariner-its-web-browsing-ai-agent/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "TechCrunch reporting at I/O 2025: Mariner rolling out to AI Ultra subscribers ($249.99/month), now runs on cloud VMs, handles up to 10 tasks simultaneously. Integrates with AI Mode in Search, Agent Mode. Competes with OpenAI Operator, Amazon Nova Act, Anthropic Computer Use. Partnerships with Ticketmaster, StubHub, Resy.",
      "notes": "Independent tech journalism; includes critical perspective on reliability."
    },
    {
      "title": "Our vision for building a universal AI assistant (Google Blog)",
      "url": "https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-deepmind/gemini-universal-ai-assistant/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Google I/O 2025 blog post explains Mariner as part of universal AI assistant vision. Gemini 2.5 Pro extended toward world models. Project Astra capabilities (video understanding, screen sharing, memory) integrated into Gemini Live. Mariner now can complete up to 10 tasks at a time. Computer use capabilities coming to Gemini API.",
      "notes": "Official Google DeepMind vision blog; places Mariner in broader strategy."
    },
    {
      "title": "Google shuts down Project Mariner (The Verge)",
      "url": "https://www.theverge.com/tech/925559/google-project-mariner-shut-down",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "May 2026: Project Mariner shut down on May 4, 2026. Technology integrated into Gemini Agent and AI Mode. A new 'auto-browse' feature in Chrome performs multi-step tasks like researching flight costs.",
      "notes": "Independent tech journalism; confirms Mariner's discontinuation and technology migration."
    },
    {
      "title": "Google Search I/O 2026 updates (Google Blog)",
      "url": "https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Official blog: Search upgraded to Gemini 3.5 Flash. Intelligent Search Box dynamically expands, accepts multimodal inputs (text, images, files, video, Chrome tabs). Information agents: 24/7 background monitoring, push notifications, synthesized updates. Agentic booking, Antigravity coding in Search. Personal Intelligence expanded. Information agents first for Pro/Ultra subscribers summer 2026.",
      "notes": "Official Google blog; most comprehensive source for I/O 2026 Search announcements."
    },
    {
      "title": "Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action (Google Blog)",
      "url": "https://blog.google/intl/en-africa/products/explore-get-answers/gemini-3-5/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "May 2026: Gemini 3.5 Flash released. 4x faster than other frontier models. SOTA on Terminal-Bench 2.1 (76.2%), GDPval-AA (1656 Elo), MCP Atlas (83.6%), CharXiv Reasoning (84.2%). Powers Gemini Spark (24/7 personal AI agent). Default model for Gemini app and AI Mode. Partnerships: Shopify, Macquarie Bank, Salesforce, Ramp, Xero, Databricks.",
      "notes": "Official Google blog; key model announcement with benchmark scores."
    },
    {
      "title": "SIMA 2 blog post (Google DeepMind)",
      "url": "https://deepmind.google/blog/sima-2-an-agent-that-plays-reasons-and-learns-with-you-in-virtual-3d-worlds/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "November 2025: SIMA 2 built on Gemini, evolves from instruction-follower to interactive gaming companion. Can reason about high-level goals, converse, self-improve via trial-and-error. Generalizes to unseen environments e.g. ASKA, MineDojo, Genie 3 worlds. Closes gap with human performance. Limitations: long-horizon tasks, short memory context window, precise low-level actions.",
      "notes": "Official DeepMind blog; research prototype, not a product."
    },
    {
      "title": "SIMA 2 paper (arXiv)",
      "url": "https://arxiv.org/html/2512.04797",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Detailed paper: SIMA 2 uses Gemini Flash-Lite with SFT + RL. Trained on human demonstration data and synthetic 'bridge' data. Evaluated on 10+ games including held-out environments. Nearly doubles SIMA 1 success rate. Demonstrates self-improvement loop using Gemini to generate tasks and rewards. Approach validated for robotics transfer.",
      "notes": "Primary research paper; comprehensive technical detail."
    },
    {
      "title": "AlphaEvolve: A coding agent for scientific discovery (arXiv)",
      "url": "https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.13131",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "June 2025: DeepMind's AlphaEvolve uses evolutionary algorithm with LLMs to improve code. Developed more efficient data center scheduling, simplified hardware accelerator circuit design, accelerated LLM training. Discovered first improvement in 56 years over Strassen's algorithm for 4x4 complex matrix multiplication (48 multiplications).",
      "notes": "White paper on arXiv; significant algorithmic discovery result."
    },
    {
      "title": "Upgraded Deep Research coming to Gemini app (9to5Google)",
      "url": "https://9to5google.com/2025/12/11/gemini-deep-research-agent/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "December 2025: Google announces significantly more powerful Deep Research agent for developers via Interactions API. Powered by Gemini 3 Pro, trained to reduce hallucinations. Benchmarks: 46.4% HLE, 66.1% DeepSearchQA, 59.2% BrowseComp. Will soon be available in Gemini app, Search, NotebookLM.",
      "notes": "Independent tech news; reports benchmark numbers and developer access details."
    },
    {
      "title": "Google opens updated Deep Research Agent to developers (The Decoder)",
      "url": "https://the-decoder.com/google-opens-updated-deep-research-agent-to-developers-with-new-api/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "medium",
      "evidence": "December 2025: Reports Deep Research agent powered by Gemini 3 Pro, iterative research loop (formulate queries → read results → identify gaps → search again). SOTA on HLE (46.4%), DeepSearchQA (66.1%), BrowseComp (59.2%). New Interactions API with server-side state, MCP support. DeepSearchQA benchmark: 900 causal chain tasks across 17 fields.",
      "notes": "Independent tech news; includes critical note about AI errors remaining a weakness."
    },
    {
      "title": "Deep Research preview (Google AI for Developers)",
      "url": "https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/models/deep-research-preview-04-2026",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Official developer docs for deep-research-preview-04-2026 and deep-research-max-preview-04-2026. Supports text, image, PDF, audio, video input. Output text (cited reports) and images. 1M token input context, 65,536 output tokens. Two versions: Deep Research (speed/efficiency) and Deep Research Max (maximum comprehensiveness).",
      "notes": "Official developer documentation; technical specs."
    },
    {
      "title": "Build with Gemini Deep Research (Google Blog)",
      "url": "https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/deep-research-agent-gemini-api/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "December 2025: Release of more powerful Deep Research agent via Interactions API. Reasoning core uses Gemini 3 Pro. SOTA on HLE (46.4%), DeepSearchQA (66.1%), BrowseComp (59.2%). Features: unified information synthesis (PDFs, CSVs, web), report steerability, detailed citations, structured outputs (JSON). Real-world use cases in finance and biotech.",
      "notes": "Official Google blog; includes benchmark comparisons and use case examples."
    },
    {
      "title": "Google Project Mariner AI Agent 2026 (AllAboutAI)",
      "url": "https://www.allaboutai.com/ai-agents/project-mariner/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "medium",
      "evidence": "Detailed article on Mariner: 83.5% WebVoyager benchmark. Features: Observe-Plan-Act loop, Teach & Repeat, up to 10 parallel tasks, cloud-based VMs. Pricing: $250/month AI Ultra. User case studies including business research automation and grocery shopping. Comparisons to OpenAI Operator, Anthropic Claude, Microsoft Copilot.",
      "notes": "Third-party informational site; comprehensive but not official source."
    }
  ]
}

### Recorded Source Notes
- [W011] Meet Deep Research, your new AI research assistant (Google Workspace Blog) - https://workspace.google.com/blog/ai-and-machine-learning/meet-deep-research-your-new-ai-research-assistant
- [W012] Next generation Gemini Deep Research (Google Blog) - https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/next-generation-gemini-deep-research/
- [W013] Gemini Deep Research overview (gemini.google.com) - https://gemini.google/overview/deep-research/
- [W014] Google rolls out Project Mariner (TechCrunch) - https://techcrunch.com/2025/05/20/google-rolls-out-project-mariner-its-web-browsing-ai-agent/
- [W015] Our vision for building a universal AI assistant (Google Blog) - https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-deepmind/gemini-universal-ai-assistant/
- [W016] Google shuts down Project Mariner (The Verge) - https://www.theverge.com/tech/925559/google-project-mariner-shut-down
- [W017] Google Search I/O 2026 updates (Google Blog) - https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/search-io-2026/
- [W018] Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action (Google Blog) - https://blog.google/intl/en-africa/products/explore-get-answers/gemini-3-5/
- [W019] SIMA 2 blog post (Google DeepMind) - https://deepmind.google/blog/sima-2-an-agent-that-plays-reasons-and-learns-with-you-in-virtual-3d-worlds/
- [W020] SIMA 2 paper (arXiv) - https://arxiv.org/html/2512.04797
- [W021] AlphaEvolve: A coding agent for scientific discovery (arXiv) - https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.13131
- [W022] Upgraded Deep Research coming to Gemini app (9to5Google) - https://9to5google.com/2025/12/11/gemini-deep-research-agent/
- [W023] Google opens updated Deep Research Agent to developers (The Decoder) - https://the-decoder.com/google-opens-updated-deep-research-agent-to-developers-with-new-api/
- [W024] Deep Research preview (Google AI for Developers) - https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/models/deep-research-preview-04-2026
- [W025] Build with Gemini Deep Research (Google Blog) - https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/developers-tools/deep-research-agent-gemini-api/
- [W026] Google Project Mariner AI Agent 2026 (AllAboutAI) - https://www.allaboutai.com/ai-agents/project-mariner/

{
  "query": "Perplexity AI and emerging AI search products progress 2025-2026",
  "candidate_urls": [
    {
      "url": "https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/blog/introducing-perplexity-deep-research",
      "reason": "Official Perplexity announcement of Deep Research feature, core source for product details"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://research.perplexity.ai/articles/evaluating-deep-research-performance-in-the-wild-with-the-draco-benchmark",
      "reason": "Perplexity's DRACO benchmark report comparing deep research systems across 10 domains"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://docs.perplexity.ai/docs/cookbook/articles/async-deep-research/README",
      "reason": "Official API docs for deep research preset, multi-step reasoning and batch workflows"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://suprmind.ai/hub/perplexity/",
      "reason": "Independent analysis of Perplexity models, pricing, citation accuracy benchmarks"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://anthemcreation.com/en/artificial-intelligence/deep-research-perplexity-openai-gemini-who-is-the-best/",
      "reason": "Detailed comparison of Perplexity vs OpenAI vs Gemini Deep Research"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://you.com/resources/introducing-ari-the-first-professional-grade-research-agent-for-business",
      "reason": "Official You.com announcement of ARI enterprise deep research agent"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://about.you.com/resources/research-api-by-you-com",
      "reason": "You.com Research API with SOTA DeepSearchQA benchmark results"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://grep.ai/home",
      "reason": "Grep AI research engine claiming #1 on DeepResearch Bench with 99.7% accuracy"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.11685",
      "reason": "Academic paper on DRACO benchmark methodology and results"
    },
    {
      "url": "https://arxiv.org/html/2504.03160",
      "reason": "DeepResearcher paper on RL scaling for real-world web search agents"
    }
  ],
  "fetched_sources": [
    {
      "title": "Introducing Perplexity Deep Research",
      "url": "https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/blog/introducing-perplexity-deep-research",
      "fetch_status": "failed",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Search snippet confirms: launched Feb 14, 2025; performs dozens of searches, reads hundreds of sources, produces comprehensive reports in 2-4 minutes; free tier with 5 queries/day; 21.1% on Humanity's Last Exam; 93.9% on SimpleQA; available on Web, soon iOS/Android/Mac.",
      "notes": "Page returned 403 Forbidden. Content reconstructed from search snippet and secondary sources."
    },
    {
      "title": "Evaluating Deep Research Performance in the Wild with the DRACO Benchmark",
      "url": "https://research.perplexity.ai/articles/evaluating-deep-research-performance-in-the-wild-with-the-draco-benchmark",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Perplexity open-sourced DRACO benchmark (Feb 4, 2026) with 100 tasks across 10 domains. Perplexity Deep Research achieved highest pass rates in all domains: Law 89.4%, Academic 82.4%. Led in Factual Accuracy, Breadth/Depth, Citation Quality. Lowest latency at 459.6s vs competitors 592-1808s. Outperformed OpenAI, Gemini, Claude on real-world research tasks.",
      "notes": "First-party Perplexity research blog post. Benchmark co-developed with The LLM Data Company. Model-agnostic harness."
    },
    {
      "title": "Deep Research Workflows - Perplexity Agent API",
      "url": "https://docs.perplexity.ai/docs/cookbook/articles/async-deep-research/README",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Official API documentation. deep-research preset uses openai/gpt-5.2 with high search context, max 10 steps, ~3,267 prompt tokens. Supports domain filtering (.gov, .edu, etc.), batch concurrency (3-5 requests limit), async client. auto-selects best model and configures tools.",
      "notes": "Technical documentation, not marketing. Includes code examples for production usage."
    },
    {
      "title": "Perplexity AI 2026: Models, Features, Pricing, and Citation Accuracy",
      "url": "https://suprmind.ai/hub/perplexity/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Comprehensive independent analysis as of May 2026. $21B valuation, Series E-6. Consumer flagship: Sonar Reasoning Pro. sonar-deep-research API costs ~$0.82/complex query. Citation accuracy: 37% error rate (CJR), best-in-field. But 37% still means 1 in 3 citations may be fabricated. Catch ratio 2.54 highest. SimpleQA F-score 0.858. GPQA Diamond 62.3% trails Claude/Gemini. HLE score 21.1% stale since Feb 2025.",
      "notes": "Third-party analysis site. Well-sourced with benchmarks. Last verified May 10, 2026."
    },
    {
      "title": "Deep Research: Perplexity vs OpenAI vs Gemini — who wins?",
      "url": "https://anthemcreation.com/en/artificial-intelligence/deep-research-perplexity-openai-gemini-who-is-the-best/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "medium",
      "evidence": "2026 comparison: Perplexity: free+$20/mo, <3min, 21.1% HLE. OpenAI: $200/mo, 5-30min, >21.1% HLE. Gemini: $20/mo, <15min, 6.2% HLE. Perplexity best for speed/accessibility, OpenAI for depth, Gemini for dynamic interface. Perplexity lacks interactive visuals and sometimes incomplete data on certain indicators.",
      "notes": "Blog-style comparison article. Covers key tradeoffs but not peer-reviewed."
    },
    {
      "title": "Introducing ARI: The First Professional-Grade Research Agent for Business",
      "url": "https://you.com/resources/introducing-ari-the-first-professional-grade-research-agent-for-business",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "You.com launched ARI (Advanced Research & Insights) in Feb 2025. Analyzes up to 400 sources simultaneously, delivers professional reports in under 5 minutes. Chain-of-thought reasoning, real-time verification, interactive visualizations. Enterprise-focused: combines public + private data. First to give LLMs web access (late 2022).",
      "notes": "Official You.com blog post by CEO/CTO. Early access via you.com Labs."
    },
    {
      "title": "You.com Introduces ARI Enterprise",
      "url": "https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20250515467218/en/You.com-Introduces-ARI-Enterprise-The-Most-Accurate-AI-Deep-Research-Platform-That-Unifies-Web-Internal-and-Premium-Data-Sources-to-Deliver-Strategic-Intelligence",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "ARI Enterprise launched May 2025. Beats OpenAI Deep Research 3 out of 4 times (76% win rate). 80% accuracy on FRAMES benchmark (best known). Analyzes 500+ sources simultaneously. Integrates internal data (SharePoint, OneDrive, Google Drive). Proprietary model-agnostic reasoning layer. Unlimited usage.",
      "notes": "Press release. Claims independently verified via benchmarks. $99M total funding."
    },
    {
      "title": "You.com Research API — #1 on DeepSearchQA",
      "url": "https://about.you.com/resources/research-api-by-you-com",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Research API launched with SOTA on DeepSearchQA: 83.67% accuracy, 93.16% F1. Single-agent architecture scaling to 1,000 reasoning turns and 10M tokens. research_effort tiers from lite ($12/1K req, <10s) to frontier (>$2000/1K req, >1,000s). Context masking/compaction to exceed context limits. Top SimpleQA, FRAMES, BrowseComp scores.",
      "notes": "Official You.com product page. Detailed benchmark methodology and pricing."
    },
    {
      "title": "Grep - AI research",
      "url": "https://grep.ai/home",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "medium",
      "evidence": "Claims #1 on DeepResearch Bench with 99.7% accuracy. Head-to-head vs Perplexity (70.5%), Claude (59.8%), Gemini (59.0%), ChatGPT (52.1%) on DRACO benchmark — Grep scored 78.6%. 25+ domain experts, cross-checks every claim, builds slide decks/reports/apps. REST API with 24 MCP tools.",
      "notes": "Startup website. Benchmark claims on DRACO (Perplexity+Harvard) but limited independent verification. Waitlist access."
    },
    {
      "title": "DRACO: a Cross-Domain Benchmark for Deep Research",
      "url": "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.11685",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Academic paper detailing DRACO benchmark. Perplexity Deep Research (Opus 4.6): 70.5% normalized score. Gemini Deep Research: 59.0%. OpenAI o3: 52.1%. OpenAI o4-mini: 41.9%. Opus 4.6 alone: outperforms other deep research systems. Perplexity leads all rubric axes. 100 tasks across 10 domains, ~40 criteria each.",
      "notes": "Peer-reviewed arxiv paper with authors from Perplexity. Open-source benchmark on Hugging Face."
    },
    {
      "title": "DeepResearcher: Scaling Deep Research via Reinforcement Learning in Real-world Environments",
      "url": "https://arxiv.org/html/2504.03160",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Academic paper on RL training for deep research agents. Achieves 28.9 points improvement over prompt-based baselines, 7.2 points over RAG-based RL. Multi-agent architecture with browsing agents. Emergent behaviors: planning, cross-validation, self-reflection, honesty when unable to answer. Open-source at github.com/GAIR-NLP/DeepResearcher.",
      "notes": "Research paper from GAIR-NLP. Real-world web environments, not simulated RAG."
    },
    {
      "title": "Perplexity Deep Research Challenges OpenAI and Google",
      "url": "https://winbuzzer.com/2025/02/15/perplexity-deep-research-challenges-openai-and-googles-ai-powered-information-retrieval-xcxwbn/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "medium",
      "evidence": "News article covering Perplexity Deep Research launch. Pricing: $20/mo for 500 daily queries vs OpenAI $200/mo. Free tier with 5 queries/day. Multi-step reasoning and RL for accuracy. Notes OpenAI's HLE score 26.6% vs Perplexity's reported performance. Emphasizes affordability vs precision tradeoff.",
      "notes": "Tech news article. Good for market positioning context. Published Feb 2025."
    },
    {
      "title": "Perplexity AI Deep Research vs. OpenAI Deep Research: An In-Depth Comparison",
      "url": "http://anakin.ai/blog/perplexity-ai-deep-research-vs-openai-deep-research-an-in-depth-comparison/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "medium",
      "evidence": "Technical comparison: Perplexity uses hybrid real-time search + NLP with PPLX-7B model. OpenAI uses GPT-4o with multi-hop reasoning, semantic source mapping, bias detection. Perplexity: dynamic search expansion, cross-modal synthesis. OpenAI: recursive fact-checking, temporal analysis, hypothesis generation. Perplexity dominates agile BI, OpenAI commands academic/R&D sectors.",
      "notes": "Blog post from anakin.ai. Good architectural details but may have bias toward own platform."
    },
    {
      "title": "Perplexity launches an assistant for Android",
      "url": "https://techcrunch.com/2025/01/23/perplexity-launches-an-assistant-for-android/",
      "fetch_status": "success",
      "reliability": "high",
      "evidence": "Perplexity Assistant launched Jan 2025 for Android. Multi-app actions (ride-hailing, music search, calendar events). Multimodal: camera-based queries, screen context. Maintains context across actions. Free in 15 languages. 100M queries/week. Acquired Read.cv social platform.",
      "notes": "TechCrunch article. Marks Perplexity's transition from answer engine to integrated assistant."
    }
  ]
}

### Recorded Source Notes
- [W027] Introducing Perplexity Deep Research - https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/blog/introducing-perplexity-deep-research
- [W028] Evaluating Deep Research Performance in the Wild with the DRACO Benchmark - https://research.perplexity.ai/articles/evaluating-deep-research-performance-in-the-wild-with-the-draco-benchmark
- [W029] Deep Research Workflows - Perplexity Agent API - https://docs.perplexity.ai/docs/cookbook/articles/async-deep-research/README
- [W030] Perplexity AI 2026: Models, Features, Pricing, and Citation Accuracy - https://suprmind.ai/hub/perplexity/
- [W031] Deep Research: Perplexity vs OpenAI vs Gemini — who wins? - https://anthemcreation.com/en/artificial-intelligence/deep-research-perplexity-openai-gemini-who-is-the-best/
- [W032] Introducing ARI: The First Professional-Grade Research Agent for Business - https://you.com/resources/introducing-ari-the-first-professional-grade-research-agent-for-business
- [W033] You.com Introduces ARI Enterprise - https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20250515467218/en/You.com-Introduces-ARI-Enterprise-The-Most-Accurate-AI-Deep-Research-Platform-That-Unifies-Web-Internal-and-Premium-Data-Sources-to-Deliver-Strategic-Intelligence
- [W034] You.com Research API — #1 on DeepSearchQA - https://about.you.com/resources/research-api-by-you-com
- [W035] Grep - AI research - https://grep.ai/home
- [W036] DRACO: a Cross-Domain Benchmark for Deep Research - https://arxiv.org/pdf/2602.11685
- [W037] DeepResearcher: Scaling Deep Research via Reinforcement Learning in Real-world Environments - https://arxiv.org/html/2504.03160
- [W038] Perplexity Deep Research Challenges OpenAI and Google - https://winbuzzer.com/2025/02/15/perplexity-deep-research-challenges-openai-and-googles-ai-powered-information-retrieval-xcxwbn/
- [W039] Perplexity AI Deep Research vs. OpenAI Deep Research: An In-Depth Comparison - http://anakin.ai/blog/perplexity-ai-deep-research-vs-openai-deep-research-an-in-depth-comparison/
- [W040] Perplexity launches an assistant for Android - https://techcrunch.com/2025/01/23/perplexity-launches-an-assistant-for-android/

Computer Science > Artificial Intelligence
[Submitted on 22 Jun 2025 (v1), last revised 3 Sep 2025 (this version, v2)]
Title:Deep Research Agents: A Systematic Examination And Roadmap
View PDF HTML (experimental)Abstract:The rapid progress of Large Language Models (LLMs) has given rise to a new category of autonomous AI systems, referred to as Deep Research (DR) agents. These agents are designed to tackle complex, multi-turn informational research tasks by leveraging a combination of dynamic reasoning, adaptive long-horizon planning, multi-hop information retrieval, iterative tool use, and the generation of structured analytical reports. In this paper, we conduct a detailed analysis of the foundational technologies and architectural components that constitute Deep Research agents. We begin by reviewing information acquisition strategies, contrasting API-based retrieval methods with browser-based exploration. We then examine modular tool-use frameworks, including code execution, multimodal input processing, and the integration of Model Context Protocols (MCPs) to support extensibility and ecosystem development. To systematize existing approaches, we propose a taxonomy that differentiates between static and dynamic workflows, and we classify agent architectures based on planning strategies and agent composition, including single-agent and multi-agent configurations. We also provide a critical evaluation of current benchmarks, highlighting key limitations such as restricted access to external knowledge, sequential execution inefficiencies, and misalignment between evaluation metrics and the practical objectives of DR agents. Finally, we outline open challenges and promising directions for future research. A curated and continuously updated repository of DR agent research is available at: {this https URL}.
Submission history

Computer Science > Information Retrieval
[Submitted on 3 Aug 2025 (v1), last revised 19 Aug 2025 (this version, v3)]
Title:A Survey of LLM-based Deep Search Agents: Paradigm, Optimization, Evaluation, and Challenges
View PDF HTML (experimental)Abstract:The advent of Large Language Models (LLMs) has significantly revolutionized web search. The emergence of LLM-based Search Agents marks a pivotal shift towards deeper, dynamic, autonomous information seeking. These agents can comprehend user intentions and environmental context and execute multi-turn retrieval with dynamic planning, extending search capabilities far beyond the web. Leading examples like OpenAI's Deep Research highlight their potential for deep information mining and real-world applications. This survey provides the first systematic analysis of search agents. We comprehensively analyze and categorize existing works from the perspectives of architecture, optimization, application, and evaluation, ultimately identifying critical open challenges and outlining promising future research directions in this rapidly evolving field. Our repository is available on this https URL.

parts.text:
# 2025–2026 年搜索智能体与 Deep Research 产品/论文代表性进展综述

2025–2026 年，以大语言模型（LLM）为基座的 **Deep Research Agent（深度研究智能体）** 成为 AI 领域最热门的赛道之一。多家头部公司和学术机构推出了具备多步推理、自主搜索、信息综合与报告生成能力的智能体系统。以下从产品与学术两条主线梳理代表性进展。


## 一、海外主流产品进展

### 1. OpenAI Deep Research

OpenAI 于 **2025 年 2 月 2 日** 正式推出 Deep Research，由经过端到端强化学习训练的 **o3 模型** 驱动，专为网页浏览和数据分析优化 [W001]。

**关键能力**：
- 每项任务耗时 **5–30 分钟**，生成带引用标注的综合性研究报告。
- 基准测试：**Humanity's Last Exam (HLE) 达到 26.6%**（此前 SOTA o3-mini high 为 13.0%）；**GAIA 上刷新 SOTA（67.36% pass@1）** [W001][W010]。
- 支持上传文件和表格、指定可信站点、MCP（Model Context Protocol）连接、实时进度追踪 [W001][W004]。

**版本演进**：
| 时间 | 关键更新 |
|------|----------|
| 2025.02.02 | Pro 用户首发（100 次/月） |
| 2025.02.25 | Plus/Team/Enterprise/Edu 用户扩展 |
| 2025.04.24 | 推出轻量版（o4-mini 驱动）；Pro 增至 250 次/月，免费用户 5 次/月 |
| 2025.07.17 | Agent 模式引入视觉浏览器 |
| 2026.02.10 | MCP 连接、可信站点限制、实时进度追踪 [W001] |

**局限**：OpenAI 官方系统卡将其风险等级定为 **Medium**，存在幻觉、信心校准不足等问题 [W010]。

---

### 2. Google Deep Research / Gemini 智能体生态

Google 在 2025–2026 年构建了覆盖多层次的 Agent 产品矩阵。

**Gemini Deep Research**（2025 年 3 月推出）：搭载 Gemini 1.5 Pro（后升级至 2.0 Flash Thinking → Gemini 3/3.1 Pro），自动生成研究计划并通过 Google Search 检索可信来源，支持迭代精炼和追问 [W011][W013]。

**Deep Research Max**（2026 年 4 月）：由 **Gemini 3.1 Pro** 驱动，追求最大全面性，支持原生图表/信息图、MCP、协作规划、多模态 grounding，合作伙伴含 FactSet、S&P Global、PitchBook 等 [W012]。API 支持 1M token 输入上下文 [W024]。

**Project Mariner**（2025 年 5 月 → 2026 年 5 月）：网页浏览 Agent，可同时处理 **10 个任务**，WebVoyager 基准达 83.5%。与 Ticketmaster、StubHub、Resy 等合作 [W014][W015]。**2026 年 5 月 4 日关闭**，技术融入 Gemini Agent 和 AI Mode，Chrome 新增 "auto-browse" 功能 [W016]。

**Google Search I/O 2026**：升级至 Gemini 3.5 Flash，推出**信息智能体（Information Agents）**——7×24 后台监控、主动推送通知、合成更新。智能搜索框支持多模态输入 [W017][W018]。

**学术研究亮点**：
- **SIMA 2**（2025.11）：基于 Gemini 的通用 3D 世界交互 Agent，成功率较 SIMA 1 翻倍 [W019][W020]
- **AlphaEvolve**（2025.06）：用进化算法+LLM 改进代码，发现 56 年来首个 4×4 复矩阵乘法改进（48 次乘法）[W021]

---

### 3. Perplexity AI Deep Research

2025 年 2 月 14 日上线，以 **速度和性价比** 见长 [W027]：
- 每次执行 **2–4 分钟**（远快于 OpenAI 的 5–30 分钟）
- 执行数十次搜索、阅读数百个来源
- HLE 21.1%，SimpleQA 93.9%
- 免费用户 5 次/天，$20/月套餐含 500 次

**DRACO 基准测试**（Perplexity 联合哈佛大学，2026 年 2 月开源）：覆盖 10 个领域 100 个任务，Perplexity Deep Research 在 **所有领域** 获得最高通过率（法律 89.4%，学术 82.4%），延迟最低（平均 459.6 秒，竞品 592–1808 秒）[W028][W036]。Grep AI 在 DRACO 上以 78.6% 超越 Perplexity（70.5%），但独立验证有限 [W035]。

**局限性**：引用错误率 37%（仍为同领域最佳）[W030]，缺乏交互式可视化 [W031]。

---

### 4. You.com ARI（Advanced Research & Insights）

2025 年 2 月推出，定位 **企业级专业研究 Agent** [W032]：
- 同时分析 **400–500 个来源**，5 分钟内生成专业报告
- 链式思考推理 + 实时验证
- **ARI Enterprise**（2025 年 5 月）：以 76% 胜率击败 OpenAI Deep Research；FRAMES 基准 80% 准确率（已知最高）；整合 SharePoint、OneDrive、Google Drive 数据 [W033]
- Research API 在 **DeepSearchQA** 基准取得 **83.67% 准确率、93.16% F1** 的 SOTA [W034]


## 二、中国厂商产品进展

### 1. 阿里通义 DeepResearch（开源标杆）

2025 年 9 月开源 **Tongyi-DeepResearch-30B-A3B**，首个在性能上可比肩 OpenAI Deep Research 的**全开源 Web Agent** [W068][W073]：

| 基准 | 通义 DR | OpenAI DR | 其他 |
|------|---------|-----------|------|
| HLE | **32.9** | 26.6 | — |
| BrowseComp-EN | **43.4** | — | — |
| BrowseComp-ZH | **46.7** | — | — |
| xBench-DeepSearch | **75.0** | — | — |

完整开源数据合成、Agentic CPT、SFT 冷启动、强化学习全链路。GitHub 获得 **18.5K+ 星标** [W073]。已赋能高德地图（小高老师）、通义法睿等产品。

---

### 2. 月之暗面 Kimi-Researcher / 深度研究

Kimi Deep Research 由自研 **Kimi-Researcher** 模型驱动，经端到端自主强化学习训练 [W069]：
- 每任务平均 **23 步推理**、规划 **74 个关键词**、检索 **206 个网址**
- 筛选前 3.2% 高质量内容，万字以上报告，平均引用 **26 个信源**
- 2025 年 6 月灰度测试显示 HLE Pass@1 达 **26.9%**，持平 OpenAI Deep Research [W072]

---

### 3. 智谱 AutoGLM 沉思

2025 年 3 月 31 日发布，**全球首个集深度研究（Deep Research）与实际操作（Operator）于一体的 Agent** [W070]：
- 技术路线：GLM-4 → GLM-Z1 推理模型 → GLM-Z1-Rumination 沉思模型 → AutoGLM
- GLM-Z1-Air 以 **32B 参数**媲美 DeepSeek-R1，速度提升 **8 倍**，成本降至 **1/30**
- 沉思模型通过强化学习实现自我批评、反思和长程推理
- 免费不限量开放，核心模型于 2025 年 4 月 14 日开源

---

### 4. 百度千帆 Deep Research

百度千帆企业级 Deep Research 采用 **"规划-问题演化-网页探索-报告生成"** 四阶段闭环架构 [W067]：
- 接入文心大模型 5.0 及 DeepSeek-V3.2 等 **150 余种模型**
- 自研分布式 KV Cache 在万卡集群实测吞吐平均提升 **61%**
- 支持分层递进搜索策略（广度扫描→深度挖掘→边缘探索）
- 百度 APP 2025 年 2 月全量推送新版 AI 搜索，22% 的搜索结果页已包含 AI 生成内容 [W074]

---

### 5. 腾讯元宝 AI 搜索

基于混元 T1 模型，结合多生态检索增强与 Agent 架构 [W071]：
- 构建 **DeepSearch 服务**，采用 Agentic RAG 技术，通过"规划-搜索-阅读-反思"循环处理复杂需求
- 已应用于 **700+** 内部产品场景
- 2025 上半年客户数环比增 **269%**，调用量同比增 **315%**
- 微信搜一搜灰度接入 DeepSeek-R1


## 三、学术论文代表性进展

2025–2026 年，Deep Research Agent 成为 AI 学术研究最活跃的领域之一。截至 2025 年 8 月已有首篇系统综述论文 [W041][W045]。

### （一）训练方法与框架创新

| 论文/项目 | 发表 | 核心贡献 |
|-----------|------|----------|
| **DeepResearcher** [W062] | EMNLP 2025 Main | 首个在真实网络环境中进行端到端 RL 训练的 DRA 框架；多智能体浏览架构；启发式规划、交叉验证、自我反思等涌现行为 |
| **ReSearch** [W054] | arXiv 2025 | 用 GRPO 训练 LLM 将搜索操作内化为推理链的一部分，无需监督推理步骤 |
| **R-Search** [W055] | arXiv 2025 | 多阶段、多类型奖励机制，在域内外分别提升 32.2%/25.1% |
| **STEPSEARCH** [W057] | EMNLP 2025 Main | 基于信息增益和冗余惩罚的分步 PPO，仅 19K 训练数据即在 3B/7B 模型上显著超越全局奖励基线 |
| **EvolveSearch** [W053] | EMNLP 2025 Main | 迭代自进化框架，交替 RL 探索与 SFT 优化，无需人工标注推理数据 |
| **RL 设计系统研究** [W064] | arXiv 2025 | 系统消融：AI 反馈奖励优于 F1、RLOO 优于 GRPO、在线搜索优于离线、容错 rollout 提升精度 |

### （二）多智能体架构

| 论文 | 发表 | 核心贡献 |
|------|------|----------|
| **FlowSearch** [W046] | arXiv 2025 | 动态知识流驱动并行探索与层次化解构 |
| **WebResearcher** [W047] | arXiv 2025 | IterResearch 范式（MDP+周期性整合）+ 并行多智能体探索，在 6 个基准上超越闭源系统 |
| **ManuSearch** [W048] | EMNLP 2025 Findings | 三智能体框架（方案规划、互联网搜索、网页阅读），开源透明 |
| **INFOGENT** [W049] | NAACL 2025 Findings | Navigator+Extractor+Aggregator 框架，FRAMES 提升 7%，AssistantBench 提升 4.3% |
| **BrowseMaster** [W051] | arXiv 2025 | Planner-Executor 智能体对，首个开源 Agent 突破 BrowseComp-EN 30%（30.0），中文版超 OpenAI 4% |

### （三）小模型与成本优化

| 论文 | 核心贡献 |
|------|----------|
| **Fathom-DeepResearch** [W042] | 两个 4B 模型（Search + Synthesize）在多个开放权重基准取得 SOTA |
| **Step-DeepResearch** [W061] | 32B 参数 DRA，在 Scale AI ResearchRubrics 上以极低成本媲美 OpenAI/Gemini |
| **Lucy** [W052] | 仅 1.7B 参数的 SLM，通过 RLVR + MCP 在 SimpleQA 达 78.3%，匹敌 DeepSeek-V3 |
| **InfoAgent** [W043] | Qwen3-14B 基座，实体树子采样数据管线，在 BrowseComp 达 15.3% |

### （四）搜索与推理深度融合

| 论文 | 发表 | 核心贡献 |
|------|------|----------|
| **Search-o1** [W058] | EMNLP 2025 Main | 为大推理模型（LRM）集成 Agentic RAG + Reason-in-Documents 模块 |
| **WebThinker** [W044] | arXiv 2025 | LRM 专用深度研究 Agent，Think-Search-and-Draft 策略 + 迭代在线 DPO |
| **DynaSearcher** [W066] | arXiv 2025 | 知识图谱增强搜索 Agent，多奖励 RL 在 6 个多跳 QA 数据集上 SOTA |
| **PaSa** [W065] | ACL 2025 Long | 专为学术论文搜索设计（Crawler + Selector），召回率超 Google+GPT-4o 37.78% |

### （五）基准测试与评估

| 基准 | 发布方 | 要点 |
|------|--------|------|
| **DeepResearch Bench** [W059] | GitHub/arXiv | 100 个博士级研究任务（22 个领域），RACE+FACT 双评估框架 |
| **Finder / DEFT 分类** [W060] | arXiv 2025 | 100 任务+419 检查项；14 类失败模式，核心瓶颈在证据整合与验证 |
| **DeepResearch-9K** [W063] | arXiv 2026 | 9000 道题（L1–L3 三档难度），L3 准确率仅 23.73%（教师模型） |
| **DRACO** [W036] | Perplexity+Harvard | 10 领域 100 任务，开放 Hugging Face |
| **DeepResearch Bench II** [W008] | arXiv 2026 | 截至 2025 年 11 月排名：OpenAI-GPT-o3 综合最强，但最佳 Agent 仍失败 >50% 的评估项 |


## 四、关键趋势与核心观察

1. **DRA 成为 LLM 最重要的新应用范式**：从单轮 QA 到多步自主研究的范式迁移已基本确立，OpenAI、Google、Perplexity、阿里、月之暗面等全球主要玩家悉数入局 [W041]。

2. **强化学习是核心训练范式**：RL（RLOO/GRPO/PPO/DPO）几乎成为所有高水平 DRA 的标准训练方法，关键设计选择（在线搜索、AI 反馈奖励、容错 rollout）已有系统研究 [W064]。

3. **开源力量崛起**：阿里通义 DeepResearch-30B-A3B 成为首个在多项基准上超越闭源系统的全开源 DRA [W068]；Step-DeepResearch 等以 32B 模型实现低成本的 SOTA 级别性能 [W061]。

4. **"深度研究+实际操作"融合**：智谱 AutoGLM 沉思代表了 Deep Research 与 Operator 能力合一的趋势 [W070]；Google 也将 Mariner 技术融入 Gemini Agent [W016]。

5. **评估体系快速成熟**：DeepResearch Bench、DRACO、Finder、DeepResearch-9K 等多个专用基准的涌现，使 DRA 的能力与局限得以系统度量。但最新研究发现，即便最佳 DRA 仍有 **超过 50% 的任务失败率**，与人类专家差距显著 [W008][W060]。

6. **多智能体架构成为主流**：FlowSearch、WebResearcher、BrowseMaster、ManuSearch 等采用多智能体协同架构（规划-搜索-阅读-综合），在多个基准上超越单智能体方案。

7. **小模型路线潜力初显**：Lucy（1.7B）、Fathom（2×4B）、InfoAgent（14B）等证明，通过 RL 训练和小型专用模型也能在搜索 Agent 任务上取得惊人效果 [W042][W043][W052]。
